draft.subject: Cutting manual work at Walker & Sons
draft.body:
Hi Robert,

I work with manufacturing and distribution companies to eliminate the repetitive stuff—order intake, customer callbacks, scheduling. For most operations, 30% of a coordinator's day is just moving data between systems.

We automate that layer so your team focuses on the actual work. One client cut their response time by 60% in the first month.

You're in Oakhurst—always good to work with Oklahoma businesses. Want to walk through what this could look like for you?

Kevin Starr
Founder, Starr & Partners

personalization_notes: Referenced manufacturing/enterprise operations, local Oklahoma location (Oakhurst), pain point around manual data handling
